childhood.familyBackground: Born 1931. Grandson of Mungee Ram Bangur (Calcutta stockbroker) and Ram Coowar Bangur. Marwari Hindu family.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1931년생. 무니 람 방구르(칼카타 주식 중개인)와 람 쿠워 방구르의 손자. 마르와리 힌두교 가족.
childhood.earlyLife: Part of prominent Marwari business family. Inherited and expanded family business interests.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 저명한 마르와리 사업 가족의 일원. 가족 사업 이익을 상속하고 확장.

careerTimeline.event: Bangur business empire split into 5 groups among grandsons
careerTimeline.eventKo: 방구르 사업 제국이 손자들 사이에 5개 그룹으로 분할

careerTimeline.event: Benu Gopal Bangur took control of cement operations, founded Shree Cement
careerTimeline.eventKo: 베누 고팔 방구르가 시멘트 운영 통제, Shree Cement 설립

careerTimeline.event: Shree Cement transformed from regional to national player
careerTimeline.eventKo: Shree Cement이 지역에서 전국 단위로 변환

careerTimeline.event: Shree Cement is India's 3rd largest cement manufacturer

personalTraits.knownFor: Building Shree Cement into India's major cement manufacturer, family business stewardship
personalTraits.knownForKo: Shree Cement을 인도 주요 시멘트 제조사로 구축, 가족 사업 경영
